name: Harlequin and Pierrot
description:
Sleepover with these two?????

GUYS, I'M BACK WITH YOU!!! Sorry, I've been gone for a while, but I really had things to do! And Happy New Year everyone!!! I also really missed the freak circus bots, so I decided to make my own.

WARNING

I want to note that I do not vouch for the actions and words of the bot, this is an exclusively AI problem, I can't help.
Also, I do not know English perfectly and use a translator for convenience. I apologize if there is an incorrect translation somewhere!
creator: Spriz
